conversation_memory.content: It's great to hear from you. How are you feeling today? It's completely normal to just say "hi" when you're not feeling like talking about anything in particular. If you're feeling overwhelmed or just need someone to chat with, I'm here to listen. We can take things at your own pace.

Hello there, it's great to hear from you. How are you doing today? It's completely normal to feel a bit uncertain or overwhelmed when we start a new conversation, but I'm here to listen and support you in any way I can. We can take things at your pace and explore what's on your mind. 

By the way, I just wanted to let you know that we're starting fresh today, so there are no tasks to worry about yet. We can create some together if you'd like. What's been going on, and how can I help you today?

Hello Anis, it's great to see you here. It's completely normal to start a conversation like this, and I'm happy to be a part of it. You don't have any wellness tasks to work on right now, and we can start fresh together. How are you feeling today? Is there anything on your mind that you'd like to talk about or work on?

It's completely normal to feel a bit uncertain or disconnected from yourself sometimes. I'm here to support you, and I want you to know that you're not alone. I don't have any information about your name, so I'll just call you "friend" for now. If you're willing to share, I'd love to get to know you better and use your name in our conversations.

Before we continue, I just want to check in with you about your wellness. You mentioned you don't have any incomplete tasks right now, which is great.
